mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) AS allCount, SUM(CASE WHEN status = '待支付' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS pendingPayment, SUM(CASE WHEN status = '已支付' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS paid, SUM(CASE WHEN status = '待取车' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS pendingPickup, SUM(CASE WHEN status = '租赁中' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS renting, SUM(CASE WHEN status = '待还车' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS pendingReturn, SUM(CASE WHEN status = '已完成' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS completed, SUM(CASE WHEN status = '已取消' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS cancelled, SUM(CASE WHEN status = '异常' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS abnormal FROM `order`

SELECT o.order_no AS orderNo, u.real_name AS userName, CONCAT_WS(' ', cm.brand_name, cm.series_name) AS vehicleName, o.total_amount AS amount, o.status, CASE o.status WHEN 'pending' THEN 'warning' WHEN 'paid' THEN 'success' WHEN 'picked_up' THEN 'primary' WHEN 'returned' THEN 'info' WHEN 'cancelled' THEN 'danger' ELSE 'info' END AS statusType, DATE_FORMAT(o.create_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS createTime FROM `order` o LEFT JOIN user u ON o.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN car_info c ON o.car_id = c.car_id LEFT JOIN car_models cm ON c.model_id = cm.model_id ORDER BY o.create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `order` WHERE status IN ('paid', 'picked_up')
AND rent_end_time < now()
